title: ollama/ollama
summary: Run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with a simple CLI and REST API.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: LangChain’s Ollama integration lets you plug local Ollama models into chains, agents, memory, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-js on npm
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama: chat, generate, pull, and manage models from Node or the browser.

title: ollama on PyPI
summary: Official Python client for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, and delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, and admin panel.

title: jmorganca/ollama-python
summary: Community-driven Python SDK (superseded by official ollama package) with chat, generate, and embedding helpers.

title: ollama-rag on GitHub
summary: Minimal RAG template that combines Ollama, LangChain, and Chroma to chat with local PDFs or text files.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host a Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model behind the scenes.

title: ollama4j – Java client
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama offering synchronous and asynchronous APIs for chat, generate, pull, and embeddings.

title: ollama-cli – Rust TUI
summary: Fast Rust terminal UI for chatting with Ollama models, model management, and conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot – VS Code extension
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative with inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal pod autoscaler.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server that responds to @ mentions using Ollama models; deploy via single Docker container.

title: ollama-tools – OpenAI-style functions
summary: Official docs showing how to enable OpenAI-compatible function-calling in Ollama using the tools parameter.

title: ollama-rust – Rust crate
summary: Idiomatic Rust crate for Ollama with async/await, streaming, and strong typing for chat and generate endpoints.
